  "findings": [
    "S-trap configuration is installed, which is prone to siphoning and is an illegal trap configuration under plumbing codes."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Cut out the non-compliant S-trap configuration.",
    "Re-rough the fixture drain with a compliant P-trap and a properly sized sanitary tee to establish a code-compliant fixture vent."
  ],
  "rationale": "Both the International Plumbing Code (IPC) and Uniform Plumbing Code (UPC) strictly prohibit the use of S-traps because they are prone to siphoning the water seal, which allows sewer gases to enter the occupied space. The installation must be reworked to use an approved P-trap and vent configuration.",
  "references": [
    "IPC Section 1002.3 (Prohibited Traps)",
    "UPC Section 1004.1 (Prohibited Traps)"
  ]
}
